author: shimashimarin
body:
#### PR description:

Add `SherpaHepMC3Hadronizer.cc` to be compatible with HepMC3. The latest Sherpa 2.2.16 is compiled with HepMC3 [link](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmsdist/pull/10392).

#### PR validation:

Local test with DY@LO have been performed [plots](https://jixiao.web.cern.ch/gen/sherpa/test_hepmc3/rivet-plots/). The functionality works.

*NOTE*:
- Option `-H HepMC3` should be added while running `./PrepareSherpaLibs.sh` to generate Sherpack [GENERATOR Documentation - Create Sherpack](https://cms-generators.docs.cern.ch/how-to-produce-gridpacks/sherpa/#create-sherpack);
- Or, default HepMC2 is applied for event generation.
title: update SherpaHardronizer for HepMC3
